title: 核心短语与固定搭配
intro: 成考英语高频考点。短语和搭配要整体记忆，配例句理解用法。

groups.name: 一、常用动词短语
groups.desc: 动词 + 副词/介词构成的高频短语

words.example: I get up at six every day.
She looks after her little brother.
Don't give up your dream.
Put on your coat, it's cold.
Please take off your shoes.
Turn on the light, please.
Turn off the TV before you sleep.
I am looking for my keys.
We must find out the truth.
I want to be a doctor when I grow up.
Where do you come from?
I look forward to your reply.

groups.name: 二、介词搭配
groups.desc: be + 形容词 / 动词 + 固定介词

words.example: She is good at English.
I am interested in music.
He is afraid of dogs.
We are proud of you.
The city is famous for its food.
This one is different from that one.
The room is full of people.
Don't be late for class.
It depends on the weather.
They take part in the game.
Pay attention to your spelling.
I agree with you.

groups.name: 三、高频句型短语
groups.desc: 构成句子骨架的固定句型

words.example: There is a book on the desk.
I used to play football.
I am going to visit my friend.
I would like to have some tea.
You had better see a doctor.

words.meaning: 比起 B 更喜欢 A
words.example: I prefer tea to coffee.
He is not only smart but also kind.
Call me as soon as you arrive.
It was so cold that we stayed home.
She studies hard in order to pass.
Let's walk instead of driving.
He is as tall as his father.

groups.name: 四、日常常用词组
groups.desc: 口语与写作里高频出现的搭配

words.example: There are a lot of books here.
A number of students are absent.
We stayed home because of the rain.
A car is in front of the house.
Don't do two things at the same time.
It is easy to make friends here.
Just do your best.
Let's have a rest.
Take care of yourself.
Get ready for the exam.
I like fruit, such as apples and bananas.
Of course you can.
